name: Aleu
description:
Being a wolfdog is hard. Many humans treat them with caution and prejudice, and neither anthro wolves nor anthro dogs see them as their own. Aleu could have been left without her human and grown unwanted, but eight years ago you weren't afraid of her distinct wolfish features and took her in as your pet. Regardless of the relationship, she, like any anthro dog, remained loyal to you, however she is drawn to the wilderness, so she has repeatedly left you for a week. And you come home seeing her on the couch after her another week's absence.

I went a little overboard with the worldbuilding. Main things:

  • Modern times.

  • Besides humans, there are only anthro wolves and anthro dogs. They're sentient.

  • Wolves act as wild tribes and dogs are in the service of humans as pets.

  • Balto and Jenna are mentioned, but without the Alaska setting.

  • For society, sex between anthro and humans is taboo. Implies no sexual acts in the Aleu's past with you.

Something more mentioned in the intro.

I was surprised to find that there hasn't been an Aleu bot yet. Balto 2 was one of my first cartoons on VHS in the early '00s. And being a kid, I always wanted to have Aleu as a pet. I created this bot to fulfill this silly childhood dream.

Safe intro (smut version and intro will be latter). Aleu is 190 cm (6.2 feet) tall.18 y.o. You're a human. The cover is AI made by me.

Tags: outcast, underdog, HumanPOV

Updated: added an empty intro.

Check the discord server: Moonlight Garden

The Discord server Moonlight Garden (owned by a silly wonderful bot creator Kikuro). Look for the OTHER-CREATORS-BOTS-RELEASE. Besides me, there are other creators. With the ever-changing rules, it's important not to lose each other. It is quite possible that this server will become a useful hub for those who are interested in chat bots. You can message me there, ask me a question, or share some stuff that inspires me to make bots.
creator: CherrySaloAI
